title: Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux
summary: The Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux (before October 2021: Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux-Doudeville-Yerville) is a communauté de communes in the Seine-Maritime département and in the Normandy région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2017 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes d'Yerville-Plateau de Caux and Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux-Fleur de Lin on 1 January 2017. It consists of 40 communes, and its seat is in Doudeville. Its area is 252.6 km2. Its population was 21,005 in 2018.
text:
The Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux (before October 2021: Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux-Doudeville-Yerville) is a communauté de communes in the Seine-Maritime département and in the Normandy région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2017 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes d'Yerville-Plateau de Caux and Communauté de communes Plateau de Caux-Fleur de Lin on 1 January 2017. It consists of 40 communes, and its seat is in Doudeville. Its area is 252.6 km2. Its population was 21,005 in 2018.
